meta.name: Stock Price Database · Investing & Trading Command Center

BTC.name: Bitcoin (BTCUSD)
BTC.source: FMP chart historical-price-eod-light symbol=BTCUSD (full 1Y+ history; Crypto.com get_candlestick only holds ~50 candles, use FMP for history, Crypto.com for live ticker)

meta.update_protocol: DELTA PULLS ONLY. To update: (1) read meta.symbols[SYM].last_date; (2) fetch ONLY from_date=last_date+1day to today using the source endpoint listed per symbol; (3) append new [date, close] rows (oldest-first, rounded 2dp), dedupe on date; (4) update symbols[SYM].last_date/points, meta.end_date, meta.last_updated; (5) if end_date changed, rename the file to stock_price_db_<start>_to_<newend>.json and update any references (Handoff, scheduled prompts). NEVER re-download ranges already in this file. All models, chats and scheduled tasks MUST read price history from this database instead of re-fetching it. Use python3 db_append.py <SYM> <rows.json> to apply an append safely.
meta.consumers: beta dashboard (dashboard_data_beta.json builder), Position Consultant, any future analysis
